{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321221515C90BB8C353330DF17DB3\"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616763373578289982","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"哈咯大家好～我是作者，目前日更4000字以上中，最近看这本书的人越来越多啦，还有加入书架的，非常感谢各位的支持，你们的评论、书架和互动就是支持我写字的动力，希望大家多多跟我互动，挑战有评论和互动必回。且加更1000-2000，也就是日更5000-6000～[送心][送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773418280,"group_id":"7599572329470889022","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"日更是必须的，同时更长篇和短篇。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7K21+KpOg+Q69/EgAPIzN8=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b0a9735b2b8d42e8baecb7c95a928d4c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776619097\u0026x-signature=uy1O%2BK4py5K%2BtqZl2F7EL%2Fmu%2BzU%3D","user_id":"99701301455","user_name":"慢更打字姬"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"99701301455","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家Lv.2\",\"title_id\":\"author_level_2\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家Lv.2\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7599572329470889022","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越异世界求生，我有自己的专属系统，但任务难度系数太高，竟然要我找齐《山海经》里的生物补齐残卷！天要亡我！！！然而，竟手到擒来？？难道我是天选之子！\n主角是个逗比，会慢慢成长，所有的角色都是不一样性格的独立个体，是人就会有人的情绪，完全手搓的一本求生著作。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ai/128c17baab4bb558e3c248be0c36bc36~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"慢更打字姬","author_id":"","book_id":"7599572329470889022","book_name":"上古求生，还好我读过山海经","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#585048","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":258,\"name\":\"传统玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258\u0026name=传统玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":82,\"name\":\"学霸\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82\u0026name=学霸\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":512,\"name\":\"异世大陆\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=512\u0026name=异世大陆\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":875,\"name\":\"山海经\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=875\u0026name=山海经\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":379,\"name\":\"求生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379\u0026name=求生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":758,\"name\":\"古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758\u0026name=古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7599572368322724414","read_count":"56","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"139566"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"51","tags":"传统玄幻,异世大陆,山海经,求生,古代,学霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/128c17baab4bb558e3c248be0c36bc36~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779286515\u0026x-signature=hidZgnlpqO5CJflziwECWSSK2OM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"99701301455","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"16"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"re
